headline: Is T-Mobile US, Inc. (TMUS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is TMUS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on T-Mobile US, Inc. on Valueinvestorsclub.com by ValugoBRRR. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on TMUS. T-Mobile US, Inc.’s share was trading at $198.17 as of April 29th. TMUS’s trailing and forward P/E were 19.84 and 17.39 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Q1 2026 Telecom Wars: Analyst Eye 30% Gains in T-Mobile Post-Earnings
summary: Telecom giants reported solid results in Q1 2026. Analysts are particularly bullish on T-Mobile going forward, projecting over 30% upside.
